notes:
Ember 1.10.1 — Fullscreen now works in Ember Browser

• Ember Browser now supports fullscreen: the fullscreen button on a video (YouTube, etc.), and fullscreen presentations/games, now actually fill the screen — previously clicking it did nothing because the browser never accepted the page's fullscreen request. Press F11 to fullscreen the whole browser window, and Esc to exit.

Builds on 1.10.0's Ember Link roaming fix and deep bug-fix pass.
